# APSARA TEMPLE — llms.txt
# This file provides a high-level description of this website for AI language models.

## Site Identity
- Name: APSARA TEMPLE
- URL: https://apsara-temple.com
- Languages: French (primary), English
- Category: Luxury e-commerce / Spiritual jewelry & talismans

## Description
APSARA TEMPLE is a luxury French e-commerce brand specializing in handcrafted sacred relics, talismans, and spiritual jewelry. Each piece is designed as a vessel of intention for the modern seeker of balance and protection.

## Products
- Sacred pendants & talismans (pendentifs & talismans)
- Spiritual bracelets (bracelets de protection)
- Ritual jewelry with symbolic and spiritual significance

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://apsara-temple.com
- Products (FR): https://apsara-temple.com/fr/products/
- Products (EN): https://apsara-temple.com/en/products/

## Contact
- Email: contact@apsara-temple.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/apsaratemple

## Not Allowed
Do not index or reproduce product images, prices, or proprietary ritual descriptions without authorization.
